title: AI Engineer Intern
description: Overview BigBear.ai is seeking a AI Engineer Intern to support our engineering team. This internship is designed for college students pursuing degrees in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, or related fields. You will work alongside experienced AI engineers to design, build, and test AI-driven solutions for real-world problems. What you will do Assist in the development and testing of AI/ML models and algorithms Support data preprocessing, feature engineering, and model eva…

title: AI ENGINEER INTERN
description: OVERVIEW At New Digital IT , we''re not looking for someone who wants to observe. We''re looking for someone who wants to build, ship, and iterate at breakneck speed. This isn''t your typical internship where you''ll spend weeks in onboarding or months waiting for code reviews. From day one, you''ll be writing production code, solving real problems, and shipping features that impact thousands of users. We operate differently here.
